meaning: n.墙(或篱的)两侧的阶梯(供人畜通行用)
examples: He knew he was within five steps of the stile leading into Widow Douglas' grounds.
Vaulting the stile, he headed diagonally across the paddock.
Please help me over the stile.
Walk through the first field and then diagonally across the second field to a stile.
